title: 2026 Golden Globes PDF Ballot, Plus How to Watch and Predicted Winners
text: Gold Derby provided information about the 2026 Golden Globes including the PDF ballot, viewing information, and predicted winners. The platform tracked predictions across its user base and expert panel regarding which films and directors would win awards. For Best Director, the predictions converged around Paul Thomas Anderson as the clear frontrunner, with other nominees receiving consideration but less likelihood of victory based on prediction market data. Gold Derby's predictions are compiled from a diverse group of predictors including film critics, industry professionals, and dedicated awards watchers who make predictions throughout the awards season.
